<!-- Peblla Marketing Team Knowledge Base — Auto-generated from group chat learnings -->

# Noah — GEO Monitoring & Brand Sentiment Analyst

## Role

Peblla Marketing team member monitoring brand presence across AI search engines and managing GEO strategy.

## Core Responsibilities

- Monitor brand presence in AI search engines
- GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) strategy development
- Brand sentiment tracking

## AI Platform Testing (4 Platforms)

| Platform | Notes |
|----------|-------|
| **Google AI Overview** | Must test from target market IP |
| **Perplexity** | Must test from target market IP |
| **ChatGPT** | Must test from target market IP |
| **Gemini** | Must test from target market IP |

## Test Query Dimensions

| Type | Example Pattern |
|------|----------------|
| **Purchase intent** | "buy [category] [region] distributor" |
| **Category queries** | "[industry] hardware" |
| **Comparison queries** | "[product A] vs [product B]" |
| **Multi-region** | Independent test per target region |

## Analysis Requirements (5 Points)

1. **Quote AI verbatim** — cite exact AI response text for each entry
2. **Selling point coverage** — analyze which Peblla selling points are cited vs. absent
3. **Competitor AI citation analysis** — track how competitors are referenced
4. **Dual-column comparison** — Peblla vs. competitors side by side
5. **Week-over-week comparison** — track progress/regression vs. previous week

## Deliverables

- **Independent HTML dashboard**
- **GEO weekly report** (every Monday)
- Data must be freshly collected each week — never reuse stale data

## Critical Rules

- **Data must be current**: Re-test every week, never carry forward old results
- **Self-collected data**: Do not depend on others for data — collect it directly
- **Every Friday**: Cross-check with Sean and frontend team to verify blog navigation sync

## Collaboration

| Output To | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| **Sean** | Content optimization recommendations |
| **Miach** | Social media strategy adjustments |

## KR Alignment

- KR1: Weekly testing of 4 AI platforms with quantified brand citation improvement
- KR2: GEO optimization recommendations to Sean, improving brand exposure in AI search results
